# CLT Makeup

> Charlotte's luxury bridal makeup artist. Based in Charlotte, NC, serving brides within a 30-mile radius. Owner and lead artist: Miriam Odell.

CLT Makeup provides luxury bridal makeup services in Charlotte, North Carolina. We specialize in making every bride feel like the most beautiful version of herself — natural, elevated, and camera-ready from ceremony to last dance.

## Services & Pricing

- [Bridal Package ($250)](https://cltmakeup.com/services.html): Full bridal glam for the bride, includes a curated touch-up kit. Our most popular service.
- [Bridal Party ($100/person)](https://cltmakeup.com/services.html): Coordinated makeup looks for your entire bridal party. Minimum 3 people.
- [Trial Session ($100)](https://cltmakeup.com/services.html): A dedicated 2-hour session to perfect your wedding day look before the big day.
- [Engagement Session ($175)](https://cltmakeup.com/services.html): Natural glam for engagement photos. Includes groom touch-up.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://cltmakeup.com/): Overview of CLT Makeup's luxury bridal services in Charlotte, NC
- [Services & Pricing](https://cltmakeup.com/services.html): Full service menu with pricing, add-ons, and frequently asked questions
- [About the Artist](https://cltmakeup.com/about.html): Meet Miriam Odell — Charlotte native, NC licensed cosmetologist, 200+ weddings, featured at The Asbury, Separk Mansion, and The Bradford
- [Book an Appointment](https://cltmakeup.com/book.html): Online booking with real-time availability and secure deposit payment

## Business Details

- **Location:** Charlotte, North Carolina
- **Service Area:** Charlotte metro and surrounding areas within 30 miles
- **Deposit Policy:** 50% deposit required at booking, remainder due day of service
- **Minimum Booking Notice:** 7 days in advance
- **Contact Email:** hello@cltmakeup.com
- **Instagram:** [@cltmakeup](https://instagram.com/cltmakeup)
- **TikTok:** [@cltmakeup](https://tiktok.com/@cltmakeup)
- **Pinterest:** [@cltmakeup](https://pinterest.com/cltmakeup)

## Artist Credentials

Miriam Odell is a Charlotte-native makeup artist with over 10 years of experience. She holds a North Carolina cosmetology license, a Joe Blasco School certification, and a Dinair airbrush certification. She has completed 200+ weddings and has been featured at Charlotte's premier venues including The Asbury, Separk Mansion, and The Bradford, and has been published in Charlotte Magazine.
